title: How did the iron maiden 2nd end
display_title: How did the iron maiden 2nd end
wikitext:
[]: How did the iron maiden 2nd end?             Quote Post by cubber » Fri Dec 09, 2005 2:51 pm Hi there, does anybody here how the story ended, it looks like that i won't have the chance to buy the last volume anyway, nor download it. So can anybody here tell me how the story ended?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Dec 09, 2005 4:03 pm You'll be hard pressed to find someone with interest enough to keep up on its Japanese release with the Japanese proficiency to read it. Most likely you'll have to wait for ADV to release it as a graphic novel. Otherwise, I would suggest sending an email to ADTRW. Its possible that in spite of the licensing and ceasation of the scanlations, someone in the group has been keeping up on it. But I doubt it, I've emailed them on a few occasions, and they've never returned my mails. I've kind of been keeping up on it. I collect the volumes and look at the pictures, but that's about it. I'm not even aware if it's finished or not.

[]:             Quote Post by cubber » Fri Dec 09, 2005 5:21 pm T_T , all the engagement, for nothing!! btw, thanks for the info!

[]:             Quote Post by reagen » Sun Dec 11, 2005 2:52 am Oh, it hasn't end yet? Anyway, monkey! Is there any update on the download section for that manga?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Dec 11, 2005 11:05 am http://www.evamonkey.com/iron_maiden_2nd/ Sorry to say that all that has been scanlated is in this directory. If I come across another scan/scanlation/textual translation, I'll be sure to make it available. In the meantime you'll just have to wait for the English graphic novel release. But one thing is for certain, subscribing to NewType for "Angelic Days" is foolish. It could be worth it if the magazine actually had content .

[]:             Quote Post by reagen » Tue Dec 13, 2005 9:09 pm Aww, still no update!! Oh well..., so is 'Newtype' THAT bad?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Dec 13, 2005 9:29 pm reagen wrote: so is 'Newtype' THAT bad?
